perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a patterned flat cap (Tim) speaks enthusiastically to the camera, wearing a Samsung-branded lanyard. (3) The man uses the phone's camera to capture the menu, and the interface switches to the Gemini AI tool. (4) The screen displays the AI analyzing the text and generating Chinese recommendations. (5) The man speaks to the phone, and the AI translates his request into spoken French, shown via waveform and text on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic background music plays throughout. A male voice (Tim) speaks Mandarin in a high-pitched, energetic tone. (2) A camera shutter sound effect is heard as the menu is photographed. (3) A female AI voice responds in a calm, helpful Mandarin tone, reading out food recommendations. (4) Short UI 'ding' and 'swish' sound effects accompany screen transitions. (5) A deep male voice speaks French, representing the AI's real-time translation of the user's order.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '去國外點菜 完全沒問題' (Ordering food abroad, no problem at all), '我們就靠 S25 Ultra' (We rely on S25 Ultra). (2) Decorative Text: '看不懂啊!!' (I don't understand!!), '直接實測' (Direct live test), '妥妥的出國救星!' (A definite travel lifesaver!). (3) Content Text: On-screen subtitles translate the French menu items and the Mandarin dialogue. 'Gemini' and 'Samsung' branding are visible.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Problem Identification (French menu) -> Tech Solution Demo (Gemini AI) -> Conclusion

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a green sweatshirt and a grey cap enthusiastically throws a stack of 100 NTD bills onto a wooden table while looking at the camera. (2) Several people, including a young girl, use colored sticky hand toys to slap down on the bills to catch them. (3) The man introduces 'ROUND 2' with a text overlay and throws even more bills; the participants compete frantically to grab them. (4) The man holds a few bills and speaks directly to the camera with a cheerful expression, while a red festive graphic appears on screen. (5) The video ends with a blooper of the man failing to use a sticky hand effectively, followed by a humorous close-up of his face.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy electronic background music begins immediately with a male voice speaking loudly and excitedly. (2) Sound effects of 'slapping' are heard repeatedly as the sticky hands hit the table, accompanied by high-pitched cheering from a child and a woman. (3) A deep, synthesized gaming voice announces 'Round Two'. (4) The music continues at a steady upbeat tempo as the man delivers a New Year greeting. (5) The audio ends with a humorous 'thump' sound effect and short laughter as the man makes a mistake.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '新年無聊' (Bored during New Year) - Hook text with an emotional tone. (2) '都拿去!!' (Take it all!!) - Decorative text emphasizing the action. (3) '+100' - Decorative text indicating points/money gained. (4) 'ROUND 2' - Functional text indicating the next phase of the game. (5) '誰黏到就是誰的!!' (Whoever sticks it, gets it!!) - Functional explanation of the game rules. (6) '祝大家蛇年行大運！新年快樂' (Wishing everyone good luck in the Year of the Snake! Happy New Year) - Functional festive greeting. (7) '3c有意思tim哥' - Functional branding/social media handle.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Game Play -> Round 2 Escalation -> Festive Greeting -> Blooper

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a plaid cap, glasses, and a white sweatshirt stands in an indoor room, holding a black rectangular box towards the camera. (2) He begins to unbox the device, revealing a sleek titanium-colored smartphone. (3) He demonstrates tearing the plastic seal from the side of the phone. (4) He points out specific physical features including the metal frame, the S Pen being removed from its slot, and the camera lens array on the back. (5) He shows the contents of the box, including a SIM tool and a USB-C cable. (6) He holds the phone close to the lens to show the rounded corner design and the thin bezels on the activated screen. (7) He finishes by smiling and giving a thumbs-up to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin, greeting the audience and introducing the product. (2) A clear sound effect of plastic tearing is heard as he opens the phone's packaging. (3) The male voice continues to describe the phone's specs and design features with a friendly and professional tone. (4) The background music maintains a consistent tempo and volume throughout the presentation. (5) Subtle handling noises of the phone and box are audible alongside the narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '我要挑戰台灣第二位拿到三星Galaxy S25 Ultra手機的人' (I want to challenge being the second person in Taiwan to get the Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra phone). (2) Functional text: '我們來快速開箱S25 Ultra' (Let's quickly unbox the S25 Ultra). (3) Decorative caption: '來 撕開它' (Come, tear it open). (4) Technical feature callouts: '金屬的中框' (Metal frame), 'S Pen', '藍色的', '5000萬畫素' (50 million pixels), '6.9吋', '極窄邊框' (Extremely narrow bezels). (5) CTA: '期待我們完整的開箱喔' (Look forward to our full unboxing).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Unboxing Ceremony -> Feature Highlights -> Accessories Overview -> Final Summary

(3) The background music remains consistent in volume and tempo. (4) The speaker concludes with an encouraging remark, and the music fades slightly as the video ends with a brief silence.

(5) On-screen UI text includes '威力彩' (Power Lottery), 'Apple Intelligence', and '祝大家中大獎!' (Wish everyone hits the jackpot!).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a male host in a grey sweatshirt and a patterned cap talking to the camera with expressive hand gestures. (4) The final phase shows a cartoon animation of different office buildings followed by a physical Taiwan passport being displayed.

(2) Short 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects play periodically to highlight points appearing on screen. (3) The background music maintains its pace while the male narration explains the step-by-step online process. (4) The music continues until the end of the clip as the vocal concludes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: 'Passport expired' and 'Are you still going to queue like a fool?' appears in large, colorful characters with an emotional tone. (2) Functional Text: 'Starting 2025' and 'Online renewal available' providing temporal context. (3) Numbered instructions: (1) Permanent resident status (2) Passport already expired (3) No changes to personal data. (4) Functional UI text: 'Search BOCA', 'MyData', 'Verification', and 'Online Payment NT.1300'.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a POV shot of several huskies pulling a sled through a snowy forest at night, with one dog appearing to bark at another. (2) A middle-aged man in a red winter jacket, glasses, and a hat speaks directly to the camera in front of a shelf of helmets. (3) A shot of a wooden sign for 'LAPLAND HUSKY SAFARI' appears against a snowy background. (4) Two women in identical red winter suits are seen; one shows her eyelashes which are visibly covered in white frost/ice. (5) Multiple POV shots show the sled moving quickly through the snow, following other sleds under bright artificial lights. (6) A close-up shows the man petting a black and white husky that leans into him. (7) The video concludes with a close-up of hands being warmed over a bright, crackling campfire outdoors.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic music begins immediately. Loud, energetic barking from multiple dogs is clearly audible. (2) A male voice speaks in Mandarin with an excited and friendly tone, explaining the upcoming husky experience. (3) The rhythmic sound of sled runners sliding over packed snow and the occasional 'whooshing' of wind are heard during the sledding segments. (4) The music continues at a steady volume as female voices are heard laughing and commenting on the cold. (5) The video ends with the distinct crackling and popping sounds of a wood fire, while the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'They are fighting!' - Hook text in white/yellow variety-show style (0:00-0:01). (2) 'Sudden pull forward' - Decorative text (0:02-0:03). (3) 'Finland Experience: Husky Sled!!' - Main title text with stars (0:05-0:07). (4) 'That's right everyone, we are going to experience huskies' - Functional subtitle (0:08-0:10). (5) 'Eyelashes are all frozen!' - Decorative variety-show caption emphasizing the cold (0:19-0:23). (6) 'This husky is super clingy' - Narrative caption (0:44-0:50). (7) 'It's so cold, let's toast a fire' - Functional text (0:55-0:58).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Dog Barking) -> Intro (Talking Head) -> Preparation (Lodge/Gear) -> Action (Sledding) -> Interaction (Petting/Fire)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a male creator, 3cTim, wearing a flat cap and glasses, speaking directly to the camera in a brightly lit indoor setting. A floating graphic of a silver smartphone with dual cameras is shown. (2) Chronological montage of previous Samsung Edge models (Note Edge, S6 Edge, S7 Edge) appears on screen. (3) Transition to a crowded event hall where many people are holding up smartphones to record a display. The creator is seen in the crowd, looking surprised and gesturing. (4) Close-up shots of the silver Galaxy S25 Edge on a thin metal stand, showing its extremely slim profile from the side and the rear camera module. (5) 3cTim meets another creator, Joeman, and they discuss the phone's thickness while standing in the event lobby. (6) The video ends with 3cTim back in the initial studio setting, summarizing his thoughts and gesturing with two fingers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music (BGM) starts immediately. A male voice (3cTim) speaks with an excited and professional tone in Mandarin. (2) The soundscape shifts to include field recording ambient noise from a large event, featuring background chatter and the faint sound of many people talking. (3) A second male voice (Joeman) enters, engaging in a dialogue with 3cTim; their conversation is high-pitched and enthusiastic. (4) The BGM remains consistent in the background throughout the dialogue, with the volume slightly ducked to prioritize the vocals. (5) The video concludes with the BGM fading out as 3cTim finishes his final sentence.

(2) Decorative Text: Social media handles '@3ctim' and '3c有意思tim哥' appear in the top-left corner. (3) Hook Text: Large text overlays like 'Galaxy S25 Edge', '彩蛋' (Easter Egg), and '超級薄!' (Super Thin!) appear to emphasize key points. (4) Labeling Text: Text identifying 'Joeman' and '戰場' (Battlefield) during the crowd scenes.

(2) The sound of a transition leads to a dialogue between the male voice and a soft, professional female voice in an indoor setting. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a middle-aged man wearing a brown hoodie, flat cap, and sunglasses holding a small white drone close to the camera. (7) Finally, he poses with a thumbs-up and peace sign towards the drone while smiling.

(3) Subtle sound effects (SFX) such as a mechanical click and a soft drone rotor whirring are heard during the folding and flying demonstrations. (4) The speaker's tone remains friendly, enthusiastic, and professional. (5) Outdoor ambient noise is minimal, suggesting a high-quality field recording or wind-noise reduction. (6) Music swells slightly during scenic transitions.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a man wearing a newsboy cap and glasses standing in front of the 'K-Market Esplanadi' sign in Finland. (2) The scene transitions to a series of shots inside the supermarket, showing shelves of Jenkki gum, various snacks, and a woman in a winter coat holding a box of blueberry snacks. (3) Close-up shots follow, displaying blueberry juice, oat milk, Coca-Cola with price tags, an orange juice machine, energy drinks, and Moomin-themed merchandise including keychains and chargers. (4) The setting shifts to an indoor studio/office where the man from the start holds two bags of Finnish salty liquorice. (5) He distributes the candy to several people off-screen and on-screen, capturing their facial expressions of shock, disgust, and confusion as they taste it. (6) A close-up shows the black, heart-shaped candy, followed by various individuals reacting with grimaces and laughter. (7) The video ends with the man laughing at his staff's reactions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a male voice speaking enthusiastically in Mandarin over upbeat, fast-paced background music. (2) As the scene moves into the supermarket, a festive, Christmas-themed 'Jingle Bells' melody plays, accompanied by the man's narration. (3) In the second half, the music shifts to a quirky, slightly suspenseful track as the taste-testing begins. (4) Multiple voices are heard: the main male speaker, a female voice in the supermarket, and various male and female staff members in the studio reacting with exclamations like 'Eww', laughter, and descriptive comments about the taste. (5) Sound effects (SFX) such as dings and comical accents are added during the reaction phase to emphasize the participants' expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Mandarin subtitles throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large white text with a green/black background says 'KMarket 芬蘭的超市' (KMarket Finland's Supermarket). (3) Effect Text: Labels like '很有名的芬蘭超市' (Very famous Finnish supermarket), '無敵好喝' (Indescribably delicious), '芬蘭的可樂 約台幣87.08' (Finland's Cola, approx NTD 87.08), and reaction descriptions like '好像在吃燒焦的塑膠' (Like eating burnt plastic) and '中藥味' (Herbal medicine taste).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro in Finland -> Supermarket Tour -> Studio Taste Test -> Staff Reactions

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses, a black beanie, and a red shirt stands in a brightly lit indoor space, gesturing towards the camera to introduce the JAL lounge. (2) Close-up shots show a smartphone screen demonstrating how to use an app to book a shower room and order food from a digital menu. (3) The man is seen with a small bowl of curry rice, which he begins to eat. (4) He walks through a hallway with lockers, showing a numbered plastic key card, then uses it to unlock a door labeled '1'. (5) He gives a tour of a modern shower room, highlighting the sink, a white Panasonic hairdryer, the toilet, and a basket of clean towels. (6) Inside the shower stall, he shows the multi-nozzle shower head and various bottled toiletries. (7) Finally, he walks through the buffet section, scanning various food stations including bread, pasta, salads, udon, alcoholic beverages, and an automated rice dispenser.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop music plays as a primary background layer. A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin, providing a running commentary. (2) The sound of water splashing and the rhythmic hum of a hairdryer are layered over the music during the shower room sequence. (3) Ambient lounge noises are minimal, with occasional quiet clicks corresponding to app interactions or door unlocking. (4) The music remains continuous with a steady tempo, maintaining a lighthearted and informative atmosphere throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '體驗日航 貴賓室洗澡': Excited hook title about experiencing the JAL lounge shower. (2) '第一步 掃描QR Code': Instructional text for scanning the QR code. (3) '來了 我點的 量好少哦': Subjective commentary on the small portion of food. (4) '開箱淋浴間': Review-style title for 'unboxing' the shower room. (5) '（水壓很夠）' and '（吹風機風力也行）': Evaluative notes on the water pressure and hairdryer power. (6) '來看看貴賓室有什麼好吃的': Transition text to the food section. (7) '（超多選擇）': Enthusiastic summary of the buffet options.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> App Tutorial -> Food Review -> Shower Facility Tour -> Buffet Showcase

(5) Footage of people hiking using the keyboard as a walking stick. (6) Close-up of the keyboard showing 'Google' branding and its open-source nature on a website.

(5) The video concludes with the man returning to the frame, giving a thumbs up and pointing towards the yellow car in the background.

A male voice begins speaking in an energetic and friendly tone with a clear accent. (2) The background music remains constant while the male voice continues to narrate, providing various technical numbers and specifications. (3) Ambient noise of a large crowd and distant muffled speakers from the exhibition hall can be heard beneath the music and narration. (4) The music reaches a slight crescendo and then fades out as the narrator finishes his final sentence.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses and a plaid cap introduces the scene in a busy airport terminal. (7) The scene shifts to a bright yellow Pokemon-themed vending machine displaying Pikachu merchandise and a digital animation of Pikachu.

A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin, describing the variety of vending machines at Haneda Airport. (2) Ambient airport background noise is present but low. (3) Digital sound effects (beeps and a 'cash register' chime) occur during the payment process on the machine. (4) The narrator reacts with surprise and delight when the product is dispensed in a bag. (5) A high-pitched, characteristic 'Pika-pika!' sound effect is heard when the Pokemon machine is shown. (5) Decorative Text: '帥吧！' (Cool, right?) - Confident. (6) Functional Text: '還有可愛的皮卡丘周邊' (There's also cute Pikachu merch) - Cheerful. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a flat cap sits at a wooden table with two iPhones placed in front of him. (2) Close-up view of hands inserting a Taiwan Mobile SIM card into the blue iPhone's SIM tray. (3) A series of screen-recorded speed tests (Speedtest by Ookla) are shown, comparing 'iPhone 16e' and 'iPhone 16' side-by-side. (4) Transition to an outdoor setting where the two phones are held against a window for another speed test. (5) A tabular summary of results appears on screen, listing multiple download and upload speeds for both models. (6) The man returns to the screen, holding both phones and gesturing to emphasize his final points about battery life.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins speaking in an energetic, professional tone in Chinese, accompanied by upbeat electronic background music at a moderate tempo. (2) A sharp clicking sound is heard as the SIM tray is inserted. (3) The vocal narration continues over the music, explaining the test conditions and reading out the speed results. (4) The audio landscape shifts slightly with faint ambient street noise during the outdoor segment. (5) The music stays consistent through the summary and closing, ending as the speaker finishes his sentence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Intro hook: '這次蘋果 iPhone16e 換上 C1 晶片' (This time Apple iPhone 16e uses the C1 chip). (2) Functional labels: '第一次測速' through '第五次測速' (1st speed test through 5th speed test). (3) Location context: '室內測不準 我們去室外' (Indoor tests aren't accurate, let's go outside). (4) Result summary table listing 'Type', 'Date', and 'Mbps' for both phones. (5) Highlight hook: '續航力也增加了兩個小時！' (Battery life also increased by two hours!).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a robotic arm grasping a green-trimmed steering wheel in a car interior, with a circular insert showing a middle-aged man in a blue hat speaking. (2) The scene cuts to the man (the host) in a studio setting, wearing a white t-shirt and blue hat, gesturing with his hands as informative graphics about 'Musashi' robot and autonomous driving appear beside him. (3) Interspersed is footage of a white-faced humanoid robot with large eyes sitting in a driver's seat, moving its head and hands realistically while holding a steering wheel. (4) Technical diagrams and graphs illustrating 'Benefits of Nonlinear Elastic Unit' and 'Dynamic Task Control' are shown as overlays. (5) The host continues his explanation with expressive facial expressions and concludes by pointing at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin. (2) The vocal remains the primary focus (high vocal ratio) as he explains technical details; the BGM continues at a steady volume with a consistent rhythm. (3) Occasional 'ping' and 'swish' sound effects accompany the appearance of text and graphics on the screen. (4) The audio concludes with a final encouraging statement from the speaker and a sharp cut in the music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '你家的舊車加上這東西也能變自動駕駛哦！' (Your old car can also become autonomous with this!) - Excited tone. (2) Functional Text: '「武藏」人形機器人' (Musashi humanoid robot) - Informative tone. (3) Functional Text: '39個關節 74個模擬肌肉' (39 joints, 74 simulated muscles) - Technical tone. (4) Decorative Text: '最高時速只有5km/hr' (Max speed only 5km/hr) - Informative tone. (5) Hook Text: '加油！(指日可待)' (Keep it up! (Just around the corner)) - Encouraging tone.

(3) A scenic shot shows the Sydney Harbour Bridge with a crowd of people sitting at outdoor tables by the water. (4) Back to the main character explaining the news, interspersed with shots of a hand holding a phone showing social media app icons (TikTok, Facebook, Instagram) appearing as graphics. (2) As the speaker explains the fines and laws, the music maintains a consistent tempo. There are subtle sound effects (SFX) such as a 'pop' sound when text overlays or icons appear on screen. (3) The acoustic environment remains dominated by the speaker's vocals (vocal-centric), with the music providing a modern 'tech-news' atmosphere. (4) Functional Text: '2025年開始嘗試運行', '2026年會正式實施' (Trial 2025, Implementation 2026) - providing timeline details. (5) Decorative Text: '社群平台可能危害年輕族群心理健康' (Social media may harm youth mental health) - stating the underlying reason. (6) Functional Text: '你認同澳洲政府的這項法案嗎？留言告訴我你的看法' (Do you agree with this law? perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man in a yellow hoodie and a checkered flat cap speaking enthusiastically to the camera against a grey curtain background. (3) A man in a wheelchair is shown being assisted by the exoskeleton to stand up. (4) The man is then seen walking across the lab using the exoskeleton and two support poles, including a demonstration of him climbing stairs while the creator appears in a small circular inset at the bottom right corner.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks in a fast, energetic tone in Mandarin Chinese over upbeat, electronic background music. (2) The music continues at a steady, rhythmic pace while the male narrator provides a detailed explanation of the technology. (3) Low mechanical sounds of motors and servos are faintly audible as the exoskeleton moves, but the primary focus remains on the narration and the upbeat background track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese throughout the video translating the narration about the 'Angel Suit F1' and its development by KAIST. (2) Hook Text: Large yellow and white text at the beginning says '癱瘓患者' (Paralyzed patients) and '不再是夢想' (No longer a dream). (3) Branding Text: Social media handles '3c有意思tim哥' and '@3ctim' appear at the top left. Technical specs like '每秒監測1000個訊號' (Monitoring 1000 signals per second) appear as the features are described.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a male host (Tim) sitting in a Mercedes-Benz car, wearing a newsboy cap and glasses, gesturing enthusiastically while talking. (2) Scene cuts to an exterior shot of a grey Mercedes E200 sedan, then back to the interior where Tim demonstrates a smart route feature that automatically rolls down the car window at a set location. (3) Transition to a white Mercedes EQE 300 SUV; the host demonstrates 'Automatic Assisted Parking' with a split-screen view of the dashboard display and the steering wheel moving on its own. (4) The final segment features a grey Mercedes GLC 300, focusing on the 'Transparent Chassis' camera technology shown on the large central screen, highlighting wheel trajectories on the ground.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic background music with a steady electronic beat begins. A male voice (Tim) speaks in a high-pitched, fast-paced, and excited tone, introducing the car experience. (2) The music continues as the primary audio layer beneath the clear, studio-quality narration. Subtle cabin ambient noise is present during the driving demo. (3) During the parking demonstration, electronic beeping sound effects (SFX) from the car's proximity sensors are audible, layered over the background music. (4) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic summary from the host as the music maintains its tempo before a hard cut at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '大家好 我是Tim哥' (Hi everyone, I'm Tim), '我們今天要來體驗3款賓士' (We're going to experience 3 Mercedes models). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '3款賓士' in large yellow font, '體驗他們最新科技' (Experience their latest tech). (3) Content Text: 'E200', 'EQE 300 SUV', '自動輔助停車' (Automatic assisted parking), 'GLC 300', '底盤可以透視' (Transparent chassis). (4) Emotional Text: '非常棒!' (Very great!), '無敵無腦的' (Super easy/brainless), '非常正!' (Very perfect!).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a grey newsboy cap and glasses faces the camera, gesturing with his index finger while speaking excitedly. (2) As the man performs the action of attaching the phone, a distinct 'click' or 'snap' sound effect is heard, synced with the visual. (What!!?) in a blue box to emphasize surprise. (3) Product Name: 'Insta360 Flow 2 Pro' in a cyan box. (4) Functional Steps: '第一步 展開' (Step 1 Unfold) and '第二步 把你的iPhone直接給它 啪 上去' (Step 2 Put your iPhone directly on it with a 'Pa' sound). (5) Functional Description: '可以拍直的 也可以拍橫的' (Can shoot vertically, can also shoot horizontally). (6) Final Hook: '而且裡面還有提詞機哦!' (And there's even a teleprompter inside!).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing glasses and a grey flat cap is seen in a medium close-up, speaking directly to the camera against a blurred indoor background. Large yellow and white text "詐騙新手法!" (New scamming method!) appears over him. (2) The visual alternates between the man talking and various graphic overlays including the LINE app icon and screenshots of a mobile chat interface. (3) The man uses hand gestures to emphasize points as variety-show style text captions pop up describing the scam process. (4) Close-up shots of text warnings like "注意再注意!" (Attention!) and descriptions of bank detail theft appear prominently before the video concludes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately. A male voice speaks clearly and urgently in Mandarin Chinese. (2) As the speaker details the scam, intermittent sound effects (dings and swooshes) synchronize with text appearances and scene cuts. (3) The vocal performance remains at a high, consistent volume and fast pace throughout, with the music maintaining a steady rhythm until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "詐騙新手法!" (Hook: New scamming method - Alarming). (2) "結合LINE視訊 / 分享螢幕功能" (Functional: Combined with LINE video call / screen sharing feature). (3) "刑事局指出 / 假買家 / 賣家 / 詐騙案增多" (Functional: Criminal Investigation Bureau points out / Fake buyer / Seller / Scam cases increasing). (4) "我想買這個! / 托運認證 / 實名認證 / 開通金流服務" (Functional: I want to buy this! / Shipping auth / Real-name auth / Activate payment service). (5) "注意再注意! / 竊取網銀帳號密碼及OTP碼" (Hook: Attention! / Stealing online bank accounts, passwords, and OTP codes - Warning tone).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Explanation of Scam Context -> Mechanics of the Scam -> Security Warning

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a stylized collage of Ghibli-inspired illustrations with a man's head superimposed in the center. (2) The scene transitions to a live-action shot of a man wearing a grey cap, glasses, and a green hoodie, sitting in front of a grey curtain. He gestures with his hands while speaking directly to the camera. (3) Screenshots of the Apple App Store showing various AI chatbot apps are overlaid on the screen periodically as he speaks. (4) The man continues his explanation with expressive facial expressions and hand movements, emphasizing points about app names and pricing. (5) The video ends with a close-up of the man delivering a final warning message.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a male voice speaking in Mandarin Chinese with an energetic and authoritative tone. (2) An upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music track plays throughout the entire video. (3) Subtle sound effects (SFX) such as digital pops and camera shutters accompany the appearance of text and image overlays. (4) The environment is quiet, suggesting a controlled studio setting with clear vocal recording.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '吉卜力熱潮' (Ghibli Craze) - Hook text. (2) '讓許多人跟風下載ChatGPT' (Led many people to follow the trend and download ChatGPT) - Functional narration text. (3) 'ChatGPT 假的' (ChatGPT Fake) and 'ChatGPT 真的' (ChatGPT Real) - Comparative functional text. (4) 'ChatGPTP 的應用程式' (ChatGPTP application) - Functional text identifying a specific app name. (5) '問4個問題就要要求付費' (Asks for payment after asking 4 questions) - Descriptive warning text. (6) '收費還高於 OpenAI 官方 ChatGPT Plus 的費用' (The fee is even higher than the official OpenAI ChatGPT Plus fee) - Comparative financial information. (7) '用戶的個人隱私也可能因此外洩' (User's personal privacy may also leak because of this) - Warning text. (8) '下載前大家請多加留意' (Everyone please pay more attention before downloading) - Call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Ghibli trend) -> Problem identification (Fake ChatGPT apps) -> Detailed analysis (Pricing and Privacy) -> Final Warning.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a flat cap and sunglasses is walking on a city street, talking to the camera. High-pitched digital beeps from medical equipment can be heard during the examination sequence. (4) A second male voice (the optician) enters briefly, speaking in a professional and calm tone while explaining the products. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a blue puffer jacket and a flat cap stands next to a woman in a yellow jacket. She gestures to the camera while talking. (2) The man speaks with a suggestive expression, rubbing his hands together. (3) They attempt a static electricity challenge by rubbing their arms vigorously and then trying to touch index fingers. (4) They rub their backs against each other while standing in a living room area. (5) They attempt to touch fingers again but no reaction occurs. The woman walks away disappointed. (6) A different young woman in a grey cardigan enters a white-walled room, expressing surprise. (7) She and another individual (only arms visible) rub their backs against a wall and then touch fingers, resulting in a visual spark graphic.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo background music starts. A woman's voice is high-pitched and energetic, followed by a man's lower-toned, playful voice. (2) Rapid friction sounds (rubbing clothes) are heard over the music. (3) Sounds of laughter and playful exclamations. (4) A transition sound effect (swoosh) leads to a different female voice speaking excitedly. (5) Friction sounds repeat. (6) A sharp 'ding' or electricity spark sound effect plays at the end, accompanied by a final call to action in a female voice.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 想知道我們結婚10年 (Want to know our 10 years of marriage) - Hook text. (2) 都如何保持愛的火花嗎? (How to keep the spark of love?) - Hook text. (3) 用摩擦! (By friction!) - Suggestive joke text. (4) 18禁 (18+) - Humorously warning graphic. (5) (傻眼) (Dumbfounded) - Reaction sticker. (6) 沒有啊!? (Nothing!?) - Confused tone. (7) 10年了! 不來電了! (10 years! No more spark!) - Disappointed realization. (8) 怎麼可能!! 我們來試看看! (How is it possible!! Let's try!) - Transition hook. (9) 趕快來試試看吧! (Come and try it quickly!) - Call to action.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A brown and white Corgi is seen lying inside a large, semi-transparent plastic enclosure on a wooden floor. (2) The dog begins to repeatedly and forcefully push its head and nose against the bottom edge of the plastic flap, causing the entire container to shake and rattle. (3) The dog continues its struggle, alternating between biting the edge and ramming its head into the corner to find a gap. (4) A graphic transition appears with a cartoon dog illustration. (5) The dog is then shown outside the enclosure, standing next to a black rolling office chair, with digital colorful confetti falling over the frame.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Loud, rhythmic thumping and banging sounds dominate as the dog strikes the plastic material. There are no human vocals or music. (2) The intensity of the banging increases as the dog works more vigorously to escape. (3) A brief silence occurs during the text transition. (4) An upbeat, celebratory synthesizer jingle plays accompanied by the sound of digital 'cheering' or a chime as the dog is seen free. (5) Light background ambient noise from a room remains.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '3c有意思tim哥' and '3ctim' - Decorative branding and social media handles. (2) 'OLI 拆家日常' - Decorative hook title meaning 'Oli's home-wrecking routine'. (3) '找頂!' - Functional text describing the dog's action of finding a spot to push. (4) '累死狗了...' - Decorative text implying the dog is exhausted. (5) '怎沒人理狗?' - Humorous hook questioning why no one is helping. (6) '哼...' - Decorative emotional text. (7) '理我!' and '來人啊!' - Decorative text representing the dog's imagined shouting for attention. (8) '理理狗!' and '放我出去玩' - Decorative text representing demands to be let out. (9) '五分鐘後...' - Functional text indicating a time skip of five minutes. (10) '越獄成功!' - Decorative celebratory text meaning 'Escape successful!'

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Struggle in enclosure -> Time skip transition -> Successful escape

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a distinctive checkered flat cap and glasses is talking on his phone in an outdoor setting. He reacts with exaggerated surprise. (2) He transitions to showing a small black external SSD (AGI EDM38) and demonstrates its magnetic attachment to the back of an iPhone. (3) The scene shifts to the man walking through the bustling MWC exhibition halls in Barcelona, showcasing the scale of the event. (4) Back in a more controlled environment, he demonstrates the SSD's light weight and how it can be used with non-MagSafe phones like a Sony Xperia by using an adhesive magnetic ring. (5) He introduces a white 3-in-1 charger (AGI AP138) while sitting at a table with a laptop, demonstrating its multi-device charging capabilities.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a simulated phone call; a male voice speaks in Mandarin with a tone of shocked disbelief over energetic, fast-paced electronic background music. (2) The music continues as the speaker shifts to a clear, enthusiastic presentation tone, explaining the technical features of the SSD. (3) Ambient noise of a large crowd and exhibition hall chatter becomes audible during the MWC walk-through scenes, layered under the narration. (4) The audio maintains a high speech density as he details the weights and compatibility of the devices. (5) A final transition occurs where the vocal focus shifts to the charging speeds of the second product before a quick sign-off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "什麼!?" (What!?) and "你要我拍現場所有的樣品!?" (You want me to film all the samples!?) appear with exclamation marks. (2) Product identification: "AGI EDM38" and "外接式磁吸隨身硬碟" (External magnetic portable hard drive). (3) Emphasis text: "即拍即存!" (Shoot and save instantly!) and "8個南港展覽館那麼大!!" (As big as 8 Nangang Exhibition Centers!!). (4) Specification text: "才56克而已!" (Only 56 grams!) and "比巧克力還輕!" (Lighter than chocolate!). (5) Second product text: "AGI 三合一充電器 AP138" and charging stats like "67W快充" and "45分鐘筆電可以充55%".

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a grey flat cap appears in front of a blurred indoor background, pointing forward and gesturing as he speaks. A graphic showing a LINE logo with a red 'Fake' stamp appears. (2) The scene transitions to a screen recording of a Google search page showing results for 'line-chinese.com' while the man remains in a small circular inset, explaining the phishing tactic. (3) The man returns to full-screen view. Animated graphics of a Trojan horse, a shocked emoji with 'Data Leak' text, and a megaphone appear sequentially. Finally, the official LINE website URL is displayed with a green checkmark, and the man gives a cautionary hand gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music begins. A male voice starts speaking in Mandarin with a clear, warning yet friendly tone. (2) Music continues steadily as the narration explains the Google search keyword manipulation by hackers. Short 'whoosh' and 'pop' SFX are heard as text and graphics appear. (3) The vocal speed remains consistent as the music builds slightly toward the end, finishing with the narrator's closing warning and a final musical beat.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你有想過 你下載的 LINE 是盜版的嗎' (Have you thought about whether the LINE you downloaded is a pirated version?) - Hook. (2) '近期有駭客假冒 LINE 下載網站' (Recently hackers have impersonated LINE download websites) - Information. (3) '木馬程式' (Trojan program), '個資外洩' (Data leak) - Warning text with emotional emphasis. (4) 'https://www.line.me/' - Functional URL. (5) '要小心啊~' (Be careful~) - Closing emotional hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Demonstration of Phishing -> Warning of Consequences -> Official Solution -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '3c 有意思 tim哥' and social handles (Functional/Identity). (2) '不止喔' (Decorative/Hook: Not just that). (3) '川普狂囤比特幣' (Functional: Trump hoarding Bitcoin). (4) '美國州政府也跟進了' (Functional: US state governments also followed suit). (5) '新罕布夏州 正式立法' (Functional: New Hampshire officially legislates). (6) '將比特幣納入了戰略財政儲備' (Functional: Include Bitcoin in strategic financial reserves). (7) '依據《HB302法案》' (Functional: Based on HB302 bill). (8) '州政府可以將最多5%的公共資金投資於黃金、白銀' (Functional: State government can invest up to 5% of public funds in gold, silver). (9) '還有市值超過5000億美元的數位資產' (Functional: And digital assets with market value over 500bn USD). (10) '目前唯一符合數位資產就是什麼 比特幣' (Functional: Currently the only digital asset that fits is Bitcoin). (11) '消息一出整個市場看漲' (Functional: Market turned bullish upon news). (12) '剛看手機啊 現在已經97000了' (Functional: Just checked phone, already 97000). (13) '希望呢它可以挑戰10萬美元的大關' (Functional: Hope it challenges the 100k USD mark). (14) '同時也呼應了川普在3月啟動的戰略比特幣信託' (Functional: Echoes Trump's strategic Bitcoin trust in March). (15) '動用政府去查扣20萬的比特幣作為國家資產' (Functional: Using government to seize 200k Bitcoin as national assets). (16) '還強調說永久持有、不賣一枚' (Functional: Emphasized permanent holding, not selling one). (17) '現在美國聯邦還有地方州政府同步進場' (Functional: US Federal and state governments entering simultaneously). (18) '難道比特幣真的要從虛擬貨幣變成國家級的黃金了嗎' (Functional: Is Bitcoin really turning from virtual currency to national-grade gold?). (19) '你們覺得呢' (Decorative/Hook: What do you think?).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a high-tech black autonomous wheelchair in an airport, followed by the host Tim sitting in it and gesturing excitedly. (2) Tim uses a side-mounted tablet interface to select 'Traditional Chinese' and sets 'Gate 21' as his destination. (3) The wheelchair begins moving automatically through the terminal; Tim waves to the camera while passing luxury shops like Chanel and SK-II. (4) A second man (A-Hui) walks in front of the moving wheelchair to test the sensors, and the chair stops immediately. (5) The camera shows a storage basket behind the seat and close-ups of the specialized omni-directional front wheels. (6) The video ends with Tim laughing as A-Hui points out he forgot his seatbelt.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately and continues throughout. (2) Tim's voice is high-pitched and enthusiastic, narrating the machine's functions in Mandarin. (3) Functional sound effects include a digital countdown beep ('3, 2, 1') and UI confirmation tones. (4) Ambient airport noise is audible but kept low, including the sound of footsteps and distant terminal echoes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional subtitles appear at the bottom translating Tim's speech. (2) Decorative 'Hook' text appears: '這機器 很厲害喔' (This machine is very powerful), '第一件事' (The first thing). (3) Informational overlays show 'Gate 21', '7分 30秒' (7 mins 30 secs), and humorous labels like '阿輝擋路' (A-Hui blocking the way) and '慢走不送' (Goodbye and take care).

perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '來,各位,我們現在已經拿到了 WWDC, 今年的 2025 紀念品喔' - Excited introductory tone. (2) Functional Text: '你看這個袋子,這袋子是我覺得贏了去年跟前年' - Subjective praise. (3) Functional Text: '很漂亮,而且這邊還有喜歡的粉紅色,有沒有看到?' - Highlighting specific colors. (4) Functional Text: '趕快看一下,裡面有什麼東西,包含第一個,誒,每年的水壺,有沒有? WWDC25,一樣有粉紅色,' - Cataloging items. (5) Functional Text: '誒,這個也是粉紅色的誒,你看,喔,這裡掛包包上,' - Instructional. (6) Hook Text: '重點是,嘿嘿,就是它啦,每年PIN呢?都有一些新的一些含意在裡面,我們大家來看有什麼?' - Highlighting the main attraction with mystery. (7) Functional Text: Explanations of 'Apple intelligence', '加州的州花' (California state flower), 'Metal API', and '章魚在鍵盤上打字' (octopus typing) - Educational tone. (8) Functional Text: 'WWDC25,持續鎖定我們頻道' - Call to action.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a grey hoodie and a flat cap stands against a grey concrete wall, excitedly holding an iPhone box towards the camera. (2) The scene shifts to a top-down view of a wooden table where hands unbox a white iPhone 16e, removing the protective paper seals. (3) Close-up shots highlight specific features: the single 48MP camera lens on the back, the new action button on the side, the USB-C port at the bottom, and the front screen displaying the iOS 18 interface with a notch. (4) The phone is held and rotated in the hand to show its matte white finish and the silver Apple logo as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic music begins immediately. An enthusiastic male voice speaks in Mandarin, announcing the arrival of the iPhone 16e. (2) Sound effects such as paper tearing and digital 'pings' are heard during the unboxing and when text overlays appear. (3) The vocal remains high-energy as it describes the technical specifications (camera, button, port, screen), maintaining a consistent volume over the background music. (4) The music reaches a peak and ends abruptly with the visual cut.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '我拿到 iPhone 16e!' (I got iPhone 16e!) appearing with a hook-like graphic. (2) Decorative Text: 'iPhone 16e 搶先開箱' (iPhone 16e Early Unboxing) displayed in a stylized pink and white box. (3) Functional Text: '4800 萬像素單鏡頭' (48MP Single Lens), '動作按鈕' (Action Button), 'USB-C (沒有 Lightning 了)' (USB-C - No more Lightning), '6.1 吋' (6.1 inch), 'OLED 螢幕' (OLED Screen) providing technical details with a professional tone. (4) Social Media Branding: '3c有意思tim哥' and '@3ctim' visible as persistent watermarks.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of an iPhone with a Corgi wallpaper resting on a white knitted texture; a person's hand enters and taps the screen. (2) A white charging cable is inserted into the phone, causing the screen to light up and display 'Charging' along with the current percentage. (3) The camera zooms into the Dynamic Island area, which briefly shows a status heart icon and then a text string indicating time remaining to reach 80% charge. (4) The scene transitions to the phone's Settings app, where the user navigates to the 'Battery' section to display the detailed charging estimation graph and text.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A rhythmic, upbeat, and mellow lofi hip-hop track begins immediately and plays throughout the video. (2) Clear digital sound effects (SFX) are heard, including the iPhone's signature charging chime and haptic-like click sounds during screen interactions. (3) No vocals or speech are detected at any point in the recording.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: 'iOS18讓你沒有充電🔋焦慮' (iOS18 relieves your charging anxiety), appearing in a bold white font at the bottom. (2) Functional Text: '開始充電' (Start charging), indicating the action being performed. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '仔細看動態島下面有出現充電多久即可80%' (Look closely, it shows how long to reach 80% below the Dynamic Island). (4) Functional Text: '設定裡電池那邊也會顯示！' (It's also shown in the Battery settings!), used as a concluding tip.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in an indoor parking garage. A man wearing a white t-shirt, blue cap, and glasses is seen walking away from a white electric vehicle that is plugged into a charging station. He turns around looking surprised when called. (2) He approaches the camera and begins a high-energy explanation, gesturing toward the 'MyCharge' station and the car. He demonstrates the charging process by holding the charging gun and showing his smartphone screen. (3) A series of quick cuts show the smartphone app interface, the charging port on the car, and close-ups of the charging station's display. (4) The man stands in front of the station, pointing at his phone and the equipment while speaking enthusiastically. He uses various hand signals (pointing, thumbs up, counting) to emphasize his points. (5) The final segment shows the man summarizing the benefits, still in the parking garage, ending with a direct address to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic pop music begins immediately. A male voice off-camera shouts 'Hey Boss! Boss!' in a casual tone. The main male voice responds with a questioning 'Huh? What's up?'. (2) As the man starts explaining, the background music remains constant and driving. The main male vocal is clear, fast-paced, and highly enthusiastic, sounding like a professional presenter or influencer. (3) Occasional 'pop' and 'swoosh' sound effects (SFX) are heard, synchronized with text appearances on the screen. (4) In the middle section, a brief 'ping' sound is heard when the app interface is shown. (5) The video concludes with the host's voice maintaining a persuasive tone, with the music fading out at the very end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '欸老闆！老闆！' (Hey Boss! Boss!) - Hook/Dialogue. (2) 'MyCharge 隨插即充' (MyCharge Plug and Charge) - Decorative/Hook Text. (3) '手把手教學 step1 - step9' (Step-by-step tutorial steps 1-9) - Functional Text/Instructional. (4) '全台第一個全面支援' (Taiwan's first to fully support) - Promotional/Hook. (5) '6/30以前綁定...送30元充電金' (Bind before 6/30... get 30 NTD credit) - Call to Action/Promotion. (6) '是不是超快' (Isn't it super fast?) - Emotional variety-show style caption.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (man walking away) -> Transition to explanation -> Step-by-step app demonstration -> Benefits summary and CTA.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a blue textured cap speaks directly to the camera, gesturing with his hands. (2) The camera transitions to a wall display featuring several smartphones mounted in white rectangular frames. (3) The man's hand points chronologically through the Galaxy Fold series from 2019 (Fold 1) to the latest model (Fold 7). (4) The camera pans to another section showing the evolution of the Galaxy Z Flip series, starting from the 2020 model. (5) Close-up shots compare the external screen sizes of various Flip models as the camera moves along the wall.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic male voice begins speaking over an upbeat, mid-tempo electronic background track. (2) A sharp 'ping' sound effect occurs as the camera shifts to the product wall. (3) The speaker lists model numbers and years as the camera pans, with subtle ambient noise of a crowded exhibition hall or showroom audible in the background. (4) The speech continues at a fast pace while the music remains steady and rhythmic until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken commentary, such as '大家好' (Hello everyone) and '我們來帶大家看一下' (Let's take a look). (2) Hook Text: 'Galaxy Fold 演進史 還有 Flip 演進史' (Galaxy Fold and Flip Evolution History) appears as a variety-show style overlay. (3) Decorative/Informational Text: Labels on the display wall like 'The first Galaxy Fold', '2019', '2020', and 'Galaxy Z Flip7' are visible. (4) Hook Text: '螢幕變大史' (Screen enlargement history) highlights the core feature being discussed.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Chronological Product Walkthrough -> Comparison Highlight

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a female character sitting on a couch, smiling and gesturing towards a smartwatch on her wrist. (2) Transition to a male host in a cap and glasses standing in front of a 'Galaxy Unpacked' event backdrop, speaking energetically and pointing. (3) Chronological display of the Samsung Galaxy Watch8 Classic, Watch8, and Watch Ultra on rotating stands with high-end product lighting. (4) Close-up demonstration of software features including remote camera control via the watch, the Samsung Health running coach interface on a smartphone, and a blood vessel health metric. (5) Final montage showing various colorful watch bands and different watch faces being cycled through rapidly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music starts immediately. (2) A male voice enters with a professional and enthusiastic tone, speaking Mandarin Chinese. (3) Short sound effects ('bling' sounds) are synchronized with product reveals. (4) The music maintains a constant rhythm as the vocal narration explains technical features. (5) Music fades slightly at the very end with a clean cut.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken commentary about the Galaxy Watch features. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '3c有意思tim哥' logo appears in the top left corner. (3) Descriptive titles: 'Galaxy Watch8 Classic', 'Galaxy Watch8', 'Galaxy Watch Ultra', '遠端控制控制拍照' (Remote control photography), '練跑教練' (Running coach), and '血管負荷' (Blood vessel load) appear to highlight specific features.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with extreme close-up shots of a slim, light green foldable smartphone resting on a reflective surface. (2) A clear plastic pencil is placed next to the folded phone to demonstrate its slim profile, followed by the main character, a middle-aged male wearing glasses and a hat, sliding the phone into his khaki pants pocket with ease. (3) The scene shifts to a crowded tech exhibition where the creator places the phone on a digital scale showing '216.2g'. (4) He unfolds the phone to reveal a large square inner display, interacting with multiple floating windows including YouTube and Maps. (5) In a different indoor setting (closet area), he holds a blue version of the phone, using its camera to show his wardrobe. (6) In a dining area, he holds a menu while looking at the phone. (7) Finally, he stands in a well-lit room wearing a white 'Roots' t-shirt, gesturing towards the camera while a white version of the phone is shown in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. (2) A male voice speaks enthusiastically with a high-pitched, energetic tone, describing the phone's features. (3) Subtle ambient crowd noise is audible during the exhibition scenes. (4) A calm, synthesized female AI voice (Gemini Live) is heard responding to the speaker's questions about fashion and food. (5) Sharp sound effects (SFX) like 'shing' or 'ding' accompany the appearance of on-screen text and graphics. (6) The audio ends with a high-energy concluding sentence from the male speaker.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White and yellow subtitles at the bottom center translating the creator's Mandarin speech. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large bold characters appearing throughout, such as '摺疊機 有多薄?' (How thin is the foldable phone?), '比1支鉛筆還薄!' (Thinner than a pencil!), '比一杯咖啡還更輕' (Lighter than a cup of coffee), 'Galaxy Z Fold7', and '大容量1TB' (Large capacity 1TB). (3) Effect Text: '實測中' (Testing) appears in the top right corner during AI demos.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Introduction of physical specs -> Demonstration of software features -> Real-world AI utility scenarios -> Final hardware pitch and call to action.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a comprehensive marketing review for the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7. It aims to persuade potential buyers by highlighting three main pillars: its surprisingly slim and light physical design (comparing it to a pencil and coffee), its superior productivity via the large screen and multitasking, and its cutting-edge AI features (Gemini Live) that solve everyday problems like choosing an outfit or understanding a foreign menu.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator explicitly names the product, demonstrates its features in detail, and provides a specific purchase link and discount code in the final pitch.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a yellow t-shirt and a grey cap is talking to the camera in an indoor setting with a bookshelf and curtains behind him. (2) He holds up a very small, grey electronic device (an SSD) and points to it. (3) Transitions to close-up shots of the device sitting on a wooden mannequin hand, then shows the device being plugged into the USB-C port of an iPhone. (4) Screen recordings and hands-on footage show the user navigating the iOS Files app and transferring videos to the external drive. (5) The device is then shown being plugged into an Android phone and a Windows laptop to demonstrate cross-platform compatibility. (6) A finger is shown touching a small sensor on the device to demonstrate the fingerprint encryption feature. (7) The man returns to the screen, gesturing emphatically while speaking, and finally points towards the product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Male vocals start immediately with an energetic and conversational tone. (2) Upbeat, fast-paced background music (BGM) with an electronic feel enters as he reveals the product. (3) Sound effects (SFX) like a 'ding' and a 'whoosh' are heard during text overlays and scene transitions. (4) During the phone demo, ambient UI sounds from the phone (clicks) are audible. (5) The BGM remains consistent throughout the video, maintaining a high energy level, while the man's voice remains the dominant audio layer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我昨天跟客戶開會的時候' (Hook/Functional: Narrative start). (2) '拿到一個好東西' (Hook: Excitement). (3) 'ADAM elements iKlips S USB-C 超微型指紋加密 SSD' (Decorative: Product name). (4) '全球最小的 USB-C SSD' (Decorative: Key feature). (5) '大概跟 Airwaves 口香糖一樣小' (Decorative: Size comparison). (6) '檔案太大' (Functional: Problem statement). (7) '無敵快 / 傳完了！' (Decorative: Speed emphasis). (8) '450MB/s / 400MB/s' (Functional: Specs). (9) '指紋辨識加密 / 隱私保障' (Decorative: Feature highlight). (10) '3年保固 / 趕快去買吧！' (Decorative/CTA: Closing and warranty).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Talking head intro -> Product reveal -> Practical demo (iOS/Android/PC) -> Security feature highlight -> Historical context & Brand legacy -> Final recommendation.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with a cap and glasses speaks directly to the camera in a crowded exhibition hall. (2) The scene shifts to a blue four-legged robot dog named 'Simba' at a booth labeled Pegatron. (3) The camera zooms in on the robot's head, showing its camera lens and LiDAR sensors. (4) A close-up reveals a golden signature on the blue metal casing of the robot. (5) The man demonstrates the robot's movement; it crouches and stands back up while people in the background watch. (6) The man laughs and admits staff are helping control it while the robot continues to walk and turn.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music starts. A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin. Ambient background noise of a large crowd and mechanical hums. (2) The vocal continues as sound effects (SFX) like pops and whooshes punctuate text overlays. (3) The sound of the robot's motor is audible during close-up shots. (4) The host's voice remains the dominant sound through the end, maintaining a high energy level.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我來和碩 COMPUTEX' (I'm at Pegatron COMPUTEX) - Functional/Hook. (2) '第一個就是他們的 Simba' (The first one is their Simba) - Functional. (3) 'LiDAR 在這裡' (LiDAR is here) - Functional. (4) '這是黃仁勳的簽名' (This is Jensen Huang's signature) - Hook/Informative. (5) '我可以聲控喔' (I can voice control) - Decorative/Playful. (6) '是工作人員幫我的啦' (It's the staff helping me) - Humorous/Correction.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Reveal -> Feature Highlights -> Humorous Demo -> Outro

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Storytelling -> Climax -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to entertain and inform the audience about a viral tech-related news story regarding the extreme durability of an iPhone dropped by a skydiver. By contrasting the modern smartphone with the legendary Nokia 3310 and highlighting a cheap phone case, the creator seeks to spark debate and engagement in the comments about whether device engineering or protective accessories are more important for phone safety.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The logo for 'miko' (a mobile phone retail brand) is persistently displayed in the top left corner throughout the video.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The presenter's signature flat cap and the '3c有意思tim哥' branding in the corner.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: High-quality short-form video production designed for social media platforms like TikTok or Reels, utilizing rapid cuts and colorful text stickers to maintain high viewer retention.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap and a mauve t-shirt stands in a brightly lit indoor studio, gesturing enthusiastically towards several tech products on a table. (2) The scene shifts to close-up shots of an 'eiP Pencil 2' being used to write on an iPad screen and snapping magnetically to the tablet's side. (3) A series of shots showcase a Harry Potter-themed Sorting Hat base designed as a stylus holder. (4) Hands are seen interacting with an iPad attached to a 'Magnetix Keyboard,' demonstrating the trackpad and shortcut keys. (5) A split-screen comparison shows a smartphone calculator app calculating the price difference between official Apple accessories and the eiP alternatives. (6) The video concludes with the man pointing to a discount code 'TIMBTS' appearing on screen next to the products.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced and energetic male vocals in Mandarin begin immediately, accompanied by an upbeat, electronic background music track with a strong, steady beat. (2) Sound effects (SFX) of stylus tapping on glass and a magnetic 'click' sound are heard during product demonstrations. (3) The narration maintains a high volume and persuasive tone throughout, detailing specific product names and prices. (4) The background music remains consistent in tempo until the end, where it fades out as the final call to action is delivered.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '今年蘋果 BTS 專案' (Apple BTS project this year) - Hook. (2) '送 AirPods 4' (Free AirPods 4) - Hook. (3) 'eiP Pencil 2' - Functional. (4) '非常簡單直覺' (Very simple and intuitive) - Decorative. (5) '哈利波特分類帽底座' (Harry Potter Sorting Hat Base) - Functional. (6) '可拆卸式鍵盤 2 代' (Detachable Keyboard Gen 2) - Functional. (7) '價差 1 萬元' (Price difference of 10,000) - Hook/Effect. (8) 'TIMBTS' - Promo code.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Apple BTS) -> Alternative Product Intro -> Detailed Feature Demo -> Price Comparison -> Discount Code Outro

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is an endorsement designed to encourage viewers, specifically students during the Apple Back to School season, to purchase third-party iPad accessories from the eiP brand. It positions these products as more affordable yet highly functional alternatives to official Apple gear, using a direct price comparison and a special discount code to incentivize immediate purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, verbal recommendation of the brand 'eiP', price comparison favorability, and the provision of a personalized discount code 'TIMBTS'.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tim's signature flat cap, high-speed 'shopping channel' style delivery, and '3c 更有意思' branding overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively leverages seasonal marketing (Apple BTS) to offer a budget-friendly solution, which likely performs well within the tech-vlog community in Taiwan.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a yellow T-shirt and a plaid newsboy cap is seen in an indoor golf simulator, swinging a golf club. (2) The scene transitions to the man standing in a studio-like setting, speaking directly to the camera with enthusiastic hand gestures. (3) He holds up a black smartwatch, showing its face and side profile. (4) Close-up shots demonstrate the watch's thinness compared to a finger and an Apple Watch Ultra. (5) The man demonstrates the watch's interface, scrolling through menus and a golf course map. (6) He is shown wearing the watch under a grey suit jacket sleeve to highlight its slim fit. (7) He uses the watch's screen as a flashlight to look inside a bag. (8) He uses the watch to make a contactless payment at a yellow parking kiosk. (9) The video concludes with him speaking back in the studio setting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a sharp 'thwack' of a golf ball being hit, followed by a loud 'Wow!' exclamation. Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts. (2) A male voice speaks clearly and energetically, maintaining a professional yet friendly tone throughout the video. (3) The audio contains subtle digital sound effects (swish, click) synced with on-screen text appearances. (4) The music remains consistent in volume behind the narration. (5) Near the end, the 'beep' of a payment terminal is heard during the payment demonstration. (6) The video ends with the man's final promotional remarks and the music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text in the top left corner displays social media handles '3c有意思tim哥' and '3ctim'. (2) Functional text '大家都知道' (Everyone knows) appears as he speaks. (3) Decorative text 'Apple 生態系' (Apple Ecosystem) appears with an Apple logo. (4) Hook text '好像只有蘋果 才會做到 我要的功能' (It seems only Apple can do the functions I want) appears in a large font. (5) Product title '史上最纖薄 Garmin 智慧手錶 Garmin Venu X1' (Thinnest Garmin smartwatch in history...) appears. (6) Functional text lists features: '又輕又薄' (Light and thin), '7.9mm 薄' (7.9mm thin), '40克' (40g), '2吋 AMOLED' (2-inch AMOLED), '4萬個球場資料庫' (40,000 golf course database), '電池續航力' (Battery life). (7) Brand text 'GarminPay 行動支付' (Garmin Pay mobile payment) appears during the kiosk scene. (8) Final hook '推薦大家去櫃上體驗' (Recommend everyone to experience it at the counter) appears at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro with action hook -> Direct address review -> Feature-specific b-roll demonstrations -> Practical use-case demos -> Outro recommendation.

It aims to persuade the audience of the watch's utility and premium features through side-by-side comparisons and practical demonstrations.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a newsboy cap walks through a subway station, speaking to the camera with a cheerful expression. (2) The camera focuses on a Tokyo Metro station map and transfer guide; a hand points to specific locations like Nagatacho and Shibuya, highlighting car numbers 5 and 8. (3) A fast-motion sequence shows a subway train arriving at a platform, followed by the man walking through the station and up an escalator. (4) The man passes through an IC card ticket gate and walks toward an outdoor area. (5) The final scene captures a crowd of people photographing cherry blossoms in full bloom under a cloudy sky.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Enthusiastic male vocals in Mandarin dominate the audio, accompanied by the echoey ambient noise of a station corridor. (2) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music enters. (3) The rhythmic 'clack-clack' and 'whoosh' of a train arriving at the platform is heard. (4) A short electronic 'ding' sound occurs as an IC card is tapped at a ticket gate. (5) The audio transitions to outdoor ambient noise including muffled chatter from a crowd and distant traffic.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '教大家在東京 (Teaching everyone in Tokyo)', '如何快速換乘電車 (How to quickly transfer trains)'. (2) Hook Text: '(保證快又準) (Guaranteed fast and accurate)'. (3) Descriptive Text: '永田町 (Nagatacho)', '澀谷 (Shibuya)', '立馬實測 (Immediate real-world test)', '(有手扶梯✅) (Has escalator)', '速度超快 (Super fast speed)'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed map explanation -> Practical demonstration/test -> Successful result.

Specifically, it teaches viewers how to use station transfer maps to identify the optimal train car numbers (e.g., car 5 or 8) that align perfectly with escalators and exits at their destination, thereby saving time and avoiding confusion in busy stations like Shibuya.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man named Tim speaking directly to the camera in a modern, brightly lit indoor lounge. (2) Quick cuts show screenshots of news articles regarding new airline regulations for portable chargers. (3) A brief b-roll shot shows the view from an airplane window over a city at night. (4) Back to Tim, who begins holding and demonstrating a thin, pink power bank, showing its front and back. (5) Close-up shots show the power bank's LED display and how it magnetically attaches to an iPhone. (6) The man demonstrates the 'Airplane Mode' function of the power bank by pressing a button and observing the LED flash. (7) Comparison shots show the power bank side-by-side with an iPhone 16 Pro Max to emphasize its thinness. (8) Towards the end, he shows various product colors (blue, silver, black) and a protective leather pouch.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music plays throughout the entire video. (2) A clear, energetic male voice provides continuous narration in Mandarin, explaining product features and travel regulations. (3) Digital sound effects like 'pings' and 'whooshes' are added during text transitions and feature demonstrations. (4) The overall audio environment is clean, resembling a studio or high-quality field recording without significant background noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom, transcribing the speaker's words. (2) Large, stylized decorative text overlays appear frequently, such as 'Regulations for Power Banks' (對於行動電源的規範), 'Airplane Mode?!' (也有飛航模式?!), and 'VIONTA L5 Power Bank'. (3) Technical specifications like '5000mAh', '8.9mm', and '112g' are displayed as functional text overlays. (4) Call-to-action text and brand information for 'ADAM elements' appear toward the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Problem/Regulation Context -> Product Solution Reveal -> Detailed Feature Demo -> Buying Info & CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a flat cap, black-framed glasses, and a yellow t-shirt is centered in the frame, speaking directly to the camera against a blurred indoor background. Large yellow and white text with a Japanese flag icon appears as a hook. (2) As the man continues to speak and gesture with his hands, various graphics appear: a pile of gold coins with the Bitcoin symbol, the Coinbase logo with a crown, and the Metaplanet company logo. (3) Numbers like '1.17億美元' and '10,000顆' appear alongside a Bitcoin coin graphic to emphasize his points. The man remains in the same position throughout, using hand gestures to explain the financial news. (4) The video ends with the man asking a final question while holding his hands up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks clearly in Mandarin with an energetic and informative tone, introducing the topic of a Japanese company's Bitcoin strategy. (2) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music (synth-pop style) begins to play alongside the narration. Occasional sharp sound effects (pings or pops) occur when new graphics or text appear on screen. (3) The speaker's voice remains the dominant audio layer, maintaining a steady pace without significant background noise. (4) The music and narration conclude simultaneously as he finishes his final sentence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '日本超狂企業！' (Japan's super crazy enterprise!) - Hook text in large yellow characters. (2) '比特幣持有超越了 Coinbase!' (Bitcoin holdings surpassed Coinbase!) - Informational hook. (3) 'Metaplanet' - Brand name on screen. (4) '1.17億美元' ($117 million) and '突破1萬顆!' (Exceeded 10,000 coins!) - Statistical data points. (5) Functional subtitles at the bottom translate the spoken Mandarin throughout the entire video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Detailed Financial Facts -> Summary of Strategic Significance -> Conclusion and CTA

(7) A close-up of a Tesla Optimus humanoid robot waving its hand is shown. (8) Images of French fries and fried chicken appear with price tags of US$4 and US$15 overlaid. A male voice speaks energetically in Mandarin, introducing the topic of Tesla's new restaurant. (3) Subtle digital sound effects ('blips' and 'dings') occur during scene transitions and text pop-ups. (4) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic sentence from the narrator as the music fades slightly.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a patterned flat cap, and a white t-shirt is centered in the frame, speaking enthusiastically to the camera. He is holding a black box for the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7. (2) He rotates the box to show the design and branding, then proceeds to peel off the top security sticker with a deliberate motion. (3) He opens the box and pulls out a navy blue folding smartphone. He unfolds it and shows the slim profile to the camera, gesturing with his hands to emphasize its thinness. (4) He holds the phone while continuing to speak, eventually pointing towards the viewer as he mentions his upcoming street test in New York.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts. A high-pitched, energetic male voice begins speaking in Mandarin Chinese. (2) As the man peels the sticker, the music dips slightly to emphasize the crisp, crackling sound effect (SFX) of the adhesive being pulled. (3) The music continues at a steady pace while the speaker describes the phone's color and features. (4) The audio ends with a concluding tone as the speaker promotes his next video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "嘿 各位" (Hey everyone) - welcoming tone. (2) Decorative Text: "Galaxy Z Fold 7" - blue font identifying the product. (3) Functional Text: "要陪伴我一整年的摺疊機了" (The folding phone that will accompany me for a whole year) - expressing excitement. (4) Hook Text: "清脆的聲音啊" (A crisp sound!) - drawing attention to the unboxing audio. (5) Decorative Text: "海影藍" (Sea Shadow Blue) - identifying the specific color variant. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The host, a middle-aged man wearing a newsboy cap and a beige jacket, stands in front of a digital directory in what appears to be a shopping mall in Ginza, pointing at a restaurant. (2) Transition to the restaurant interior, showing a physical menu titled 'Brand Pork Course'. (3) A series of dishes are served: a tomato appetizer with jelly, shredded cabbage with dressing, and several varieties of premium deep-fried pork cutlets served on a wire rack. (4) The host is shown eating the pork cutlets, nodding in approval, and giving a thumbs-up. (5) Close-ups of different pork cutlet preparations follow, including a pork burger, a roll with bamboo shoots, a cheese-filled croquette, and cutlets topped with wasabi or truffle oil. (6) The chef's hands are seen plating the food behind a counter. (7) The meal concludes with pork tea-soaked rice and a large strawberry shaved ice dessert. (8) The host returns to a lobby setting to provide a final recommendation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music begins. A male voice (host) speaks in a friendly, enthusiastic tone, introducing the 'God of Pork Cutlets' in Ginza. (2) The soundscape transitions to the restaurant; the host's voice continues describing each dish over the music. Ambient sounds of a busy but refined restaurant are audible, including the clinking of plates and faint background chatter. (3) A second male voice (the chef) is heard briefly in the background, speaking in Japanese and English to describe the dishes as they are served. (4) Crunchy sound effects accompany the visual of the host biting into the fried food. (5) The host's voice remains the dominant audio element, maintaining a high-pitched, excited tone throughout the tasting. (6) The video ends with the music fading out as the host gives his final verdict.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: '銀座最強' (Ginza's Strongest) and '豬排之神' (God of Pork Cutlets) appear in large, bold fonts to hook the viewer. (2) Functional text: Dish names and components are listed, such as '前菜' (Appetizer), '第一道 腰內肉' (First course: Tenderloin), '醬料' (Sauces), and '松露豬排' (Truffle Pork Cutlet). (3) Emotional hook text: '很好吃耶' (Very delicious), '名不虛傳' (Deserves its reputation), and '真的好吃耶!' (Really delicious!). (4) Practical information: '記得要先訂位' (Remember to book a seat first) is displayed at the end. (5) Watermark: Social media handles '@3ctim' and '3c有意思tim哥' are visible in the corner.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a flat cap and glasses is sitting on a white textured sofa, holding a smartphone. (2) He holds the phone up to the camera to show a colorful Apple logo on the screen, which appears to be an event invitation. (3) He gestures excitedly with his free hand while looking directly into the lens. (4) A small circular picture-in-picture of the man appears over a full-screen image of the Apple logo. (5) He continues speaking, eventually pointing his finger at the camera and clicking his fingers in a closing gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An excited male voice begins speaking immediately as upbeat electronic background music with a steady rhythm starts. (2) A female voice is heard off-screen briefly asking a question, to which the male voice responds with high energy. (3) The background music continues at a consistent tempo as the male voice provides a fast-paced explanation. (4) Short, sharp sound effects (pops/dings) occur as various product names are highlighted. (5) The music continues through to the end of the clip as the male voice delivers a final call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken dialogue regarding an Apple event. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Floating text boxes appear listing rumored products: "iPhone 17 全系列", "Apple Watch S11", "Apple Watch Ultra 3", and "AirTag 2". (3) Hook Text: Social media handles "@3ctim" and channel names are visible in the corner. (4) Hook Text: Closing captions like "鎖定一下" (Lock it in) and "我們第一時間會給大家所有的最新訊息喔" (We will give you all the latest news first) appear to encourage engagement.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Exciting Reveal -> Rumor Listing -> Call to Action
