perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a male host in a brown corduroy cap and glasses gesturing enthusiastically toward the camera in an indoor setting. (2) Close-up shots feature black leather headphones with silver metal hardware, showing the stitching on the headband and an embossed 'H' logo on the side. (3) The host puts the headphones on, showing the fit and the leather ear cushions. (4) Detailed shots focus on the headphone's interface, including a USB-C port, a 3.5mm jack, various control buttons, and a volume scroll wheel. (5) The host demonstrates the touch-sensitive panel on the ear cup by tapping and sliding his finger. (6) The scene shifts to display various leather accessories on a shelf, including colorful Hermès Airtag holders and Magsafe card wallets with equestrian illustrations. (7) A white smartphone is shown with a leather Magsafe wallet being attached to its back.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music begins immediately and remains consistent throughout the video. (2) A male voice speaks in Mandarin with an excited and professional tone, narrating the features of the headphones and accessories. (3) The vocals remain high in volume relative to the music. (4) Minimal ambient sound is heard, indicating a controlled indoor environment or studio-like recording conditions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '聽說很厲害？！愛馬仕的耳機' (Hook text, energetic tone). (2) '上方運用與凱莉包手提把一樣的縫製方式製作' (Functional description). (3) '經典還原了！！馬鐙的靈感' (Decorative text). (4) '反應很靈敏' (Functional technical description). (5) '重點是喔！它還是用上愛馬仕Pippa' (Functional highlight). (6) '德國頂尖聲學品牌 ULTRASONE 合作代工' (Functional brand information). (7) '戴久不怕耳朵痛了！！柔軟服貼' (Decorative benefit claim). (8) '就是這支!!! iPhone 17pro 限定橘色' (Hook/Decorative text).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a flat cap stands against a plain white wall, holding a small black DJI Mic 2. (2) He introduces a smaller version, the DJI Mic mini, and then presents the full box for the DJI Mic 3. (3) He opens the box to display a charging case, USB cables, and fuzzy windscreens. (4) Close-up shots show him placing a single square transmitter on a digital scale, which reads 16.4g. (5) He demonstrates the magnetic back clip by detaching and re-attaching it to the unit. (6) The camera focuses on the receiver's touchscreen as he navigates through menus for gain adjustment, EQ presets (Bright, Regular, Rich), and channel settings. (7) He connects the mic system to an Osmo Pocket 3 device. (8) The scene shifts to an outdoor sidewalk; the man walks away from the camera toward a distant building while signaling with his hands.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin; upbeat, fast-tempo electronic music begins in the background. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the speaker's voice remains the dominant audio element, describing product features. (3) Subtle 'click' and 'whoosh' sound effects are used during graphic transitions and scene cuts. (4) The environment changes to an outdoor setting; loud traffic noise and wind become audible, but the vocal remains exceptionally clear and front-centered. (5) As the speaker moves further away, the vocal consistency is maintained, demonstrating long-range transmission without degradation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'DJI Mic 2', 'DJI Mic mini', 'DJI Mic 3' used for product identification. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '兩個結合' (Two combined) with a surprised tone; '重量只有16克' (Weight only 16g) emphasizing portability. (3) Functional Text: List of technical features: '自動增益調節' (Auto gain adjustment), '三檔音色' (Three-stage tone), '4發8收' (4 transmit 8 receive), '32-bt 浮點內錄' (32-bit float internal recording). (4) Hook Text: '到外面實測' (Real test outside) to create anticipation for the performance demo.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Unboxing -> Feature Demonstration -> Technical Settings Deep-dive -> Outdoor Range Test

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a flat cap, glasses, and a grey 'Roots' t-shirt stands on a balcony with the Tokyo Tower prominently visible in the background; he speaks to the camera and points his finger. (2) He presents a black Canon camera, showing it from the front, back, and top. (3) The scene shifts to demonstrate the camera's product-focus feature, blurring the man's face and focusing on a fuzzy microphone cover held in front of the lens. (4) The video displays the camera's lens zooming and the man sliding the compact camera into his front jeans pocket. (5) The man is seen walking through an urban park area with trees and skyscrapers, holding the camera on a small tripod grip to demonstrate stabilization. (6) Close-up shots of the camera's rear screen show technical settings for 4K 60p and a built-in cooling fan. (7) The screen shows various built-in color filters being applied to a small toy figure. (8) The man returns to the balcony setting, holding the camera toward the viewer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks energetically in Mandarin, posing a question about short-video equipment. (2) Sound effects like 'whoosh' and 'click' are heard during quick visual transitions. (3) As the man walks outdoors, subtle ambient bird chirping and distant city traffic noise are layered under the vocals. (4) The speaker's tone remains high-pitched, friendly, and persuasive throughout. (5) The music continues at a consistent high tempo until the end, fading out briefly as the man finishes his sentence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你問我' (You ask me) - Hook. (2) '拍短影音!? 都用什麼拍' (Shooting short videos!? What do you use to shoot?) - Hook/Questioning tone. (3) 'Canon Powershot V1' - Functional/Brand identifier. (4) '打開V1裡面的 產品示範近拍短片' (Open the product demo close-up video mode inside V1) - Instructional. (5) '相機就會自動 把我變模糊 產品變清楚了' (The camera will automatically blur me and make the product clear) - Explanatory. (6) '1.4吋感光元件' (1.4-inch sensor), '4K 60p', '14種色彩濾鏡' (14 color filters) - Technical specs/Informative. (7) '超級方便' (Super convenient) - Enthusiastic tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Introduction -> Feature Demonstrations (Focus, Zoom, Size, Stabilization, Specs) -> Closing Recommendation

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a hand using a screwdriver to repeatedly strike a screen protector on a white surface with high intensity. (2) The scene cuts to a man (Tim) wearing a grey flat cap and glasses, looking surprised and speaking into the camera. (3) Tim demonstrates striking the screen protector again to show it doesn't break, then transitions to showing the product packaging 'BESTSUIT EX-PROOF GLASS'. (4) A demonstration of a steel ball falling onto an orange 'D3O' material is shown to explain impact absorption. (5) Tim compares a standard glass protector (which cracks) with the D3O protector (which remains intact) using a screwdriver. (6) He then drops keys, a coin, and a handful of screws onto the protector to show scratch and impact resistance. (7) Finally, Tim holds the protector up, pointing out its transparency, curved edges, and water-repellent coating before showing the installation kit and giving a thumbs up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Loud, repetitive metallic striking sounds (SFX) are heard, followed by a fast-paced, upbeat electronic background track. (2) An adult male voice enters with a high-pitched, energetic, and professional tone, asking a rhetorical question. (3) The audio maintains a high density of speech interspersed with sharp metallic 'clink' and 'scratch' sound effects synchronized with the visual impacts. (4) The music remains steady in the background as the speaker details technical specifications. (5) The video ends with a clear call to action and the music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '3c有意思tim哥' and social media handles (Branding/Identification). (2) Hook Text: '他在做什麼?' (What is he doing?) and '不要做傻事!!' (Don't do stupid things!!) in high-contrast fonts. (3) Product Info: 'D3O 防衝擊螢幕保護貼' (D3O Anti-impact Screen Protector). (4) Technical Features: '2.5D圓邊設計' (2.5D Rounded Edge), '疏油疏水 AF鍍膜' (Oleophobic/Hydrophobic AF Coating), and '清晰高透光率' (Clear High Transparency). (5) Instructional Text: '自己DIY設計' (Self DIY Design) and '自己安裝' (Install Yourself).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Durability Demo -> Technical Explanation -> Feature Summary -> CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: '聽說今年 iPhone 17 會更貴耶!!' (I heard iPhone 17 will be even more expensive this year!!). perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a low-angle shot of a street in Tokyo with the Tokyo Tower visible in the background, followed by a cut to a man in a pink shirt speaking enthusiastically in a park-like setting. (2) A transition shows a digital map overlay identifying 'Akabanebashi Station' followed by photos and short clips of the tower from that viewpoint. (3) The scene shifts to night, showing the man standing near a parking lot with a clear view of the illuminated Tokyo Tower, accompanied by text overlays and map details for 'Times Parking'. (4) A third location is introduced at night, showing the man pointing towards the tower from a street corner in Azabu-juban. (5) The scene shifts indoors to a luxury hotel room where a woman sits by a floor-to-ceiling window showcasing a panoramic night view of the tower; the camera then pans to show the view through the curtains. (6) The video concludes with a rapid montage of high-quality photos featuring the main characters at the various locations mentioned.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately. A high-pitched, enthusiastic male voice speaks in Mandarin, introducing the topic of Tokyo Tower photo spots. (2) The music continues as the male voice describes different locations; occasional ambient street noise is audible but very low. (3) A female voice enters briefly, speaking in a friendly and clear tone, describing the hotel room view. (4) Sound effects (SFX) of a camera shutter clicking are heard repeatedly during the final photo montage as the music reaches its peak before cutting out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '來東京必拍東京鐵塔' (Must-take photos of Tokyo Tower when in Tokyo) appears in bold white. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a blue cap and glasses holds two smartphone mock-ups (orange and blue) in front of a living room setting. He gestures toward the camera lenses. (2) The man holds up a small, circular camera filter lens. (3) The scene transitions to the man inside a brightly lit electronics store (Taiwan Mobile). He stands in front of various product displays and a large screen. (4) Close-up shots of a Nintendo Switch 2 box mockup and a smartphone screen displaying a flight booking interface for STARLUX Airlines. (5) The man returns to a medium shot in the store, pointing enthusiastically at the camera and gesturing with his hands to emphasize the scale of the giveaway.

(2) As the man shows the phone mockups, a second, slightly deeper male voice (off-screen) is heard briefly responding to his statements. (3) Sound effects (SFX) like dings, pops, and camera shutters accompany the appearance of text and stickers on screen. (4) The music remains constant in volume and tempo as the scene shifts to the store environment. (5) The main vocal becomes more rapid and persuasive during the final call to action, ending with a final chime SFX.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: "iPhone 17 Pro" and "最新款特殊色" (Latest special colors) appear in large, bold fonts with animated outlines to create excitement. (3) Hook Text: "如何拿到免費的" (How to get for free) appears at 00:18 with a high-energy tone. (4) Functional Text: Prize details like "Switch 2", "星宇航空來回機票" (STARLUX Airlines round-trip tickets), and "總價值超過40萬" (Total value over 400,000) are shown with large emojis to highlight the giveaway's scale.

(4) The vocal density is high throughout, with the music fading slightly in the final seconds as the creator delivers a concluding call-to-action.

(5) He uses frequent hand gestures to emphasize points, occasionally folding his arms or pointing towards the text overlays. (6) The video concludes with a large QR code and social media contact information displayed on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop background track. A male voice (Tim) immediately starts speaking in a high-pitched, energetic, and professional tone, greeting the audience. (2) As the speaker discusses the iPhone 17 release, the music continues at a steady volume, acting as an energetic bed for the narration. (3) Periodic 'whoosh' and 'ding' sound effects are used to highlight the appearance of graphical overlays and price tags. (4) The speaker's delivery is rapid and continuous, with very few pauses, maintaining a persuasive and excited atmosphere throughout. (5) The background music remains consistent in tempo until the very end, where it slightly fades out as the speaker finishes his call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen throughout the video, translating the speaker's dialogue. (iPhone 17 has been officially released!), '超划算' (Very cost-effective), '最聰明的決定' (The smartest decision), and 'miko 米可' (brand name). (3) Information Text: Promotional details like '預約客戶享$990保留' ($990 for pre-order retention), '$3060大禮包' ($3060 gift pack), and '$1000' discounts are prominently displayed with energetic colors and fonts. (4) Contact Text: A LINE ID '@miko168' and a QR code appear towards the end.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a blue cap, glasses, and a light green t-shirt is sitting at a wooden table, holding a green smartphone and speaking directly to the camera with an expressive face. (3) The scene shifts to a direct screen recording of the smartphone's iOS interface, where he demonstrates long-pressing the home screen and navigating through the 'Edit' and 'Customize' menus. (4) He selects the 'Tinted' option and uses an eyedropper tool to match the icon color to the green phone case visible in his hand at the top of the screen. (5) The video returns to the man showing the completed color-matched home screen on the phone, nodding and smiling at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin, greeting the audience and introducing a hidden iOS 18 feature. (2) A 'snap' sound effect plays as he puts the case on the phone, followed by continuous explanatory narration as he walks through the software settings. (3) The music maintains a consistent volume throughout, providing an energetic backdrop to the tutorial. (4) The video ends with a closing remark from the speaker and the music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: 'iOS18 竟然有隱藏功能' (iOS18 actually has a hidden feature) appears in bold yellow and blue. (2) Functional text: Full Traditional Chinese subtitles throughout the video translating the spoken tutorial. (3) Decorative text: '你只要準備好一個原廠殼' (You just need an official case) and '變色了' (Changed color) appear as emphatic hooks during key moments.

(4) The conversation between the off-screen male and the on-screen female continues, focusing on the aesthetic match between her manicured nails and the phone's blue color.

(4) Functional Text: '我是為了這個做了美甲' (I got my nails done for this) - explaining the color coordination. (5) Decorative Text: '哇我的天吶' (Wow, oh my god) - expressing excitement. (6) Functional Text: '白色' (White), '藍色' (Blue), '橘色' (Orange/Titanium) - labeling the phone colors.

(6) The video concludes with wide shots showing the full scale of the crowd in the urban setting of Ginza.

(4) The volume remains constant without any fading or transitions.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of an iPhone screen showing 100% battery at 7:45 AM. (7) Final close-up of the phone screen shows 29% battery at 7:58 PM and 15% battery at 10:53 PM before the screen turns off.

(4) Functional Text: Various updates throughout the video including '電力還有95%', '下午 1:20 72%', '5:13 現在還有49%', '7:58 現在電力還有29%', and '剩15%'. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with the main creator, Tim, wearing a green jacket, a pink shirt, and a gray flat cap, standing outdoors in a park-like setting. (2) A blue Tesla Model 3 (Robotaxi) drives by and parks. Tim's friend shows the Tesla app on an iPhone 15 Pro, demonstrating the booking process. (3) The blue Tesla arrives at their location; the car dings and flashes its lights. (4) Tim and his friend get into the back seat. Tim buckles his seatbelt and explores the rear infotainment screen. (5) The car begins to drive autonomously. Tim navigates through apps like YouTube on the back screen and watches his own channel. (6) The video shows a POV of the front dashboard as the car navigates traffic and performs an 'Autopark' maneuver. (7) The video concludes with the car parked and Tim standing outside the vehicle, gesturing thumbs up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts. Tim introduces himself and the plan to ride the Tesla Robotaxi in an excited, friendly tone. (2) Sound of wind and ambient outdoor traffic. Tim's friend explains the app requirements (US Apple ID) in a steady, conversational voice. (3) Electronic dings and car horn sounds as the Tesla arrives. (4) Interior sounds include the rustle of clothing as they sit, the click of the seatbelt, and the car's system UI sound effects (blips and chimes). (5) Audio from the Tesla's speakers plays a snippet of a YouTube video. (6) Ambient hum of the electric car's motor during movement and parking. (7) Music swells for the outro as Tim gives his final thoughts.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Standard Chinese subtitles throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Tesla Robotaxi' (0:02), 'Miko 米可手機館' logo (fixed in top left), '推薦大家買手機到米可' (0:06, encouraging viewers to buy phones at Miko), 'WOW!' (1:08), '太厲害了!' (1:13, meaning 'Too powerful!'), '超讚的體驗!' (1:16, meaning 'Super great experience!'). (3) Informational Text: '美國 Apple ID 才可以下載' (0:14), '自動輔助導航駕駛' (1:05), '自動停車功能 Autopark' (1:10).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> App Booking -> Vehicle Arrival -> Autonomous Drive Demo -> Outro

(2) The music continues at a steady pace as the speaker describes the luxury bags. Occasional mechanical 'click' and 'zip' sound effects are used for emphasis. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a grey newsboy cap and a white T-shirt with a 'Mr. Peanut' mascot stands in a bright indoor setting, excitedly holding a dark blue shipping box. (2) He moves to a wooden table, places the box down, and tears open the security strip on the cardboard. (3) He opens the box to reveal two white t-shirts inside plastic packaging, one featuring a Pikachu graphic. (4) He retrieves a small circular plastic container holding a small accessory and examines it. (5) He pulls out a heart-shaped gold-toned paper clip and holds it up to the camera with a wide smile.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts. A high-pitched, energetic male voice begins speaking about returning to the office and a recent purchase. (2) The sound of cardboard tearing and plastic rustling is heard over the music. (3) The male speaker continues his narration with an excited tone. A female voice briefly responds from off-camera. (4) The male speaker continues to describe the items with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone until the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '回到辦公室' (Back to the office) - Functional, energetic. (2) '第一件事情' (The first thing) - Functional. (3) '就是看我上禮拜出差之前' (Is to see what I got before my business trip last week) - Functional. (4) '我在HUMAN MADE買的寶可夢' (The Pokemon stuff I bought at HUMAN MADE) - Functional. (5) '很多人都買不到' (Many people can't buy it) - Hook, proud. (6) '包含我老婆的親戚朋友' (Including my wife's relatives and friends) - Functional. (7) '但我有了' (But I have it) - Hook, proud. (8) '直接簡單開箱' (A direct and simple unboxing) - Functional. (9) 'HUMAN MADE' - Brand name. (10) '竟然能搶到兩件' (Actually managed to grab two) - Hook, surprised. (11) '助理這是什麼' (Assistant, what is this?) - Functional. (12) '迴紋針' (Paper clip) - Functional.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Box Opening -> Item Reveal -> Detailed Accessory Examination

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a middle-aged man wearing a flat cap and glasses, speaking directly to the camera against a neutral grey background. (2) The scene cuts to a product demonstration of the DJI Osmo Nano being weighed on a digital scale, first the core unit at 52g, then with its battery/screen module at 123.8g. (3) Sample footage follows, showing a high-speed F1 race track in Singapore with cars passing by, shot from a first-person perspective. (4) The host returns to show various magnetic mounting options: attaching the camera to a chest mount over a black t-shirt, a hat mount, and a suction mount on a glass window overlooking a city street. (5) The video concludes with the host holding the camera and giving a thumbs-up gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop background track begins immediately and remains consistent. A male voice starts speaking in Mandarin with an energetic and professional tone. (2) Sound effects (SFX) like sharp 'pings' and camera shutter clicks are synchronized with the appearance of text on screen during the weight demonstration. (3) The music maintains its tempo as the host describes the technical specs; there is no ambient noise from the F1 track sample, only the continuous BGM and narration. (4) The audio concludes with a final clear statement and the music fading out quickly as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles at the bottom of the screen accurately transcribe the spoken narration. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large bold captions appear such as 'DJI 最新的 Osmo Nano' (DJI's newest Osmo Nano) in red and black, '只只有 52g' (Only 52g), '最大特色' (Biggest feature), and '磁吸配件' (Magnetic accessories) to emphasize key selling points. (3) Social Media Handles: '3c有意思tim哥' and '@3ctim' are permanently displayed in the top left corner.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Weight/Portability Specs -> Real-world Sample -> Feature Demo (Magnetic Mounts) -> Final Verdict

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a male host wearing a flat cap and glasses, speaking animatedly toward the camera; a split screen shows a Tesla Cybertruck below him. (2) Transition to a shot of the host holding two smartphones in front of a display case at a mobile phone store. (3) The scene shifts to grainy, night-time footage of a vehicle crash and fire, with text overlays describing the incident. (4) The host returns to a studio setting, using hand gestures and diagrams to explain the Cybertruck's electronic door buttons on the B and C pillars. (5) Graphic diagrams show how to manually release doors from the inside by pulling a cord hidden under decorative panels. (6) Footage of individuals attempting to break the Cybertruck's window with tools is shown to demonstrate its strength. (7) The host concludes with final thoughts and a serious expression.

(2) Sound of a car horn and a subtle fire-crackling sound effect plays during the crash footage. (3) A 'ting' sound effect emphasizes text appearing on screen. (4) Background music continues at a steady volume while the narrator explains technical details. (5) A sharp glass-shattering sound effect accompanies the footage of the window test. (6) Music persists until the end, fading slightly as the narrator finishes speaking.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '3c有意思tim哥' (3c interesting Tim) and 'miko 米可手機館' (Miko Mobile Phone Store) appear as permanent watermarks. (4) Descriptive Text: '2024年11月 加州發生一起Cybertruck 酒駕自撞起火' (November 2024, California, a Cybertruck drunk driving self-collision fire occurred). (5) Explanatory Text: '(受困者在車內) 無法透過按壓按鈕 打開車門' ((Trapped people inside) Cannot open door by pressing button) and diagrams labeling B/C pillars.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with the host, a middle-aged man in a grey blazer and flat cap, standing in front of a large red wall with the white text 'Hermès IN THE MAKING', introducing the event. (3) Artisans are shown at work benches; one female artisan uses specialized tools to stitch a blue leather handle, while a male artisan cuts leather patterns. (4) The host moves to the silk scarf section, where large textile printers are in operation, and colorful scarves with complex patterns are displayed on spinning circular racks. (5) Further demonstrations show a female artisan hand-painting a porcelain plate featuring a blue leopard motif and another artisan working on leather gloves. (6) The host interacts with a large, interactive musical installation constructed from saddle-making tools, striking them to create sounds. (7) A sequence shows the intricate process of assembling a leather saddle on a yellow workstation. (8) Finally, the host sits on a stylized yellow saddle-shaped seat against a purple and orange background to deliver his closing remarks and summary.

A male voice speaks in Mandarin with an enthusiastic, high-energy, and professional tone. (2) As the host moves through the exhibition, the music remains consistent, but muffled ambient sounds of a crowd and distant machinery are audible underneath the narration. (3) During the workshop segments, the BGM continues at a steady volume, with no distinct voices from the artisans heard. (4) A series of bright, melodic percussive chimes or bell sounds occur as the host plays the tool-based music box installation. (5) The music fades slightly during the host's concluding summary, remaining as a light backing track until the video ends.

(2) Audible sound effects like 'pops' and 'clicks' occur in synchronization with the appearance of on-screen graphics and icons. (3) The vocal delivery remains consistent and fast-paced, describing specific scam tactics used on social media platforms. (4) The music and vocals continue smoothly until the end of the clip, finishing with a clear concluding statement.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a flat cap holds a purple Google Pixel phone, speaking with a surprised expression. Behind him is a studio setting with soft lighting and acoustic foam panels. (2) Close-up shot of the phone screen showing file transfer interfaces. (3) Transitions to a screen recording of the Android settings menu, highlighting 'Google services' and then 'Quick Share Extension'. (4) The man reappears, holding the Pixel phone and an iPhone side-by-side. (5) Close-up of the iPhone control center, showing AirDrop settings being adjusted to 'Everyone'. (6) Both phones are placed side-by-side on a white surface; a photo is successfully transferred from the Pixel to the iPhone, showing a photo of a woman on both screens. (7) The man smiles and gives a thumbs-up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music starts. A male voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin, with a clear, energetic tone. (2) As the tutorial begins, the music volume remains consistent while the speaker's voice provides step-by-step instructions. (3) Subtle 'click' and 'ding' sound effects (SFX) punctuate menu selections and the successful file transfer. (4) Background remains quiet with minimal ambient noise, suggesting a studio recording environment. (5) The music reaches a slight crescendo at the end as the speaker concludes with an enthusiastic 'Gao ding!' (Done!).
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Pixel 出大事了!' (Something big happened to Pixel!) - Hook text, excited tone. (2) '(目前僅Pixel 9系列支援) 可以跟iPhone互相傳檔案跟傳照片' (Currently only Pixel 9 series supported. Can exchange files and photos with iPhone) - Functional text/Hook. (3) '首先你要先到設定' (First, you need to go to settings) - Functional instruction. (4) '點選你的頭像' (Click your avatar), 'Google服務的所有服務裡面' (In all services of Google services), '選擇系統服務' (Select system services), 'Quick Share Extension' - Functional steps. (5) '更新' (Update), '重新開機' (Reboot) - Functional text. (6) 'AirDrop要開啟所有人' (AirDrop needs to be set to everyone) - Functional instruction. (7) '搞定!!' (Done!!) - Enthusiastic decorative text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Step-by-step tutorial (Screen recording & Handheld) -> Final demonstration and success

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap and glasses speaks directly to the camera, pointing forward and gesturing with his hands. (2) He introduces a cream-colored zippered storage bag, opening it to reveal various electronics inside. He proceeds to pull out specific items: a white power adapter, a larger black power adapter, a bundle of black cables, a foldable wireless charging stand, and a blue power bank. (3) He holds up the white 70W charger, turning it to show multiple USB ports (USB-C and USB-A). (4) Close-up shots show the white charger plugged into a power strip, connected via cables to an iPhone, AirPods, and a MacBook, with green charging indicators visible on the screens. (5) He holds up a black 140W charger, then shows it charging two MacBooks simultaneously. (6) The man returns to the frame, holding the chargers and speaking enthusiastically.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic electronic background music plays. A male voice speaks in a friendly, high-pitched, and excited tone, asking the audience about their travel habits. (2) As the man unboxes the gear, the audio captures the subtle rustling of the bag and the sound of objects being placed on a surface. The speaker lists the components clearly. (3) The speaker provides a detailed technical explanation of GaN technology with a steady and professional pace. (4) Occasional 'pop' or 'ding' sound effects (SFX) are used to emphasize key feature highlights on screen. (5) The music continues at a consistent tempo as the speaker explains the benefits of high-wattage charging for multiple laptops. (6) The speaker concludes with a call to action, mentioning a website, while the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'How many chargers do you bring when you go to Japan?' 'I organized everything today.' (2) Decorative Text: '(Media workers understand)' used to build rapport. 'norm+ 70W charger' and 'norm+ 140W charger' are displayed as labels. (3) Effect Text: 'Higher conversion efficiency, high voltage', 'Reduce power loss' appearing with green checkmarks. (4) Hook Text: 'No more fighting!' referring to charging ports. (5) Functional Text: 'Tim Brother Select Store www.3ctim.com' displayed at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Unboxing Kit -> Detailed Feature Breakdown -> Multi-device Usage Demo -> Outro/CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap and glasses, gesturing enthusiastically towards the camera in a studio setting with a light purple background. (2) Transition to a high-quality CGI animation showing a glowing Poké Ball entrance that opens to reveal a lush, green landscape. (3) Animated sequences follow, showcasing various Pokémon like Pikachu running through a forest and Chansey in front of a Poké Center in a town setting. (4) The scene cuts back to the man in the studio, who is now gesturing next to a large text graphic detailing ticket prices and benefits. (5) Short clips of animated Pokémon battles and parades are interspersed. (6) The video ends with the man pointing directly at the camera, with a Pikachu graphic appearing beside him.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks in an energetic and fast-paced tone, accompanied by upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music. (2) A sharp sound effect of a Poké Ball opening and digital chimes are heard as the animation starts. (3) The narration continues consistently, detailing the features of the theme park while the background music maintains a constant, cheerful rhythm. (4) Subtle ambient sound effects like rustling leaves and Pokémon 'cries' are mixed into the animation segments. (5) The music volume lowers slightly when the speaker explains ticket price details, then swells back up for the energetic closing statement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: "去吧！就決定是你了！" (Go! I choose you!) in large, bold characters with a Poké Ball icon. (2) Functional Information: "2026年2月5日 東京寶可夢樂園 正式開幕" (Tokyo Pokémon Park officially opens on Feb 5, 2026). (3) Content Captions: "這是全球首座戶外常設型寶可夢主題樂園" (World's first permanent outdoor Pokémon theme park). (4) Labels: "寶可夢森林" (Pokémon Forest) and "草紗鎮" (Grassy Town) appear over specific scenes. (5) Decorative Hook: "門票11/21開賣！" (Tickets on sale 11/21!). (6) Functional Text: A detailed table showing "精英訓練家通行證" (Elite Trainer Pass) and prices in JPY and TWD. (7) Final Hook: "2026 東京見！" (See you in Tokyo 2026!).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Feature Animation -> Ticket Details -> Outro Call to Action

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses, a light blue hat, and a white T-shirt featuring a heart-shaped Pokeball logo stands in an outdoor park, holding a small grey drone. He smiles and gestures towards the camera. (2) Close-up shots of the drone (DJI Neo 2) on a pebble ground, highlighting its protected propellers and camera lens. (3) The man demonstrates hand gesture controls in an open square; he makes a peace sign, holds his palms out, and the drone mimics his movements, flying closer or further away. (4) The drone eventually lands precisely on his open palm as he smiles at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Enthusiastic male vocals in Mandarin begin immediately, accompanied by upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music. (2) Sound effects like 'whoosh' and digital dings accentuate the appearance of text and transition points. (3) Ambient outdoor sounds (faint wind and birds) are audible but suppressed behind the clear studio-quality vocal track. (4) The music maintains its energetic pace until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '3C有意思tim哥' and '@3ctim' (Social media handles). (2) Hook Text: '玩空拍機很難嗎' (Is it hard to fly a drone?) and '真的很不難' (It's really not hard). (3) Feature Text: 'DJI 新出的 Neo 2', '支援 4K 高畫質' (Supports 4K high quality), '全機重量只有 151g' (Whole machine weighs only 151g). (4) Interactive Text: '手勢操控' (Gesture control), '拉近拉遠' (Zoom in/out) with helpful instructional captions.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap and glasses sits behind a wooden table, tapping on a large grey box. (2) He opens the box to reveal a smaller black package inside, which he removes and sets aside. (3) He proceeds to take out a thin black box (manual), then a black power adapter, stripping off its plastic wrapping with a quick gesture. (4) Finally, he picks up a black foldable smartphone, opening it completely to show the large screen, then closing it to reveal the back camera setup, ending with a smile toward the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Low-pitched, rhythmic tapping sounds on cardboard. (2) Shuffling and thudding sounds as cardboard boxes are moved and opened. (3) High-pitched crinkling sound of plastic being torn and removed from an object. (4) Sharp, crisp 'snap' and 'click' sounds as the foldable phone mechanism is engaged and closed. No vocals detected throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Galaxy Z TriFold ASMR 三星摺疊機開箱' (Hook text - informative and promotional). (2) '(敲敲打打)' (Decorative text - describes tapping sounds). (3) '(說明書)' (Functional text - labels the manual). (4) '(?)' (Decorative text - humorous confusion). (5) '(很清脆的聲音)' (Decorative text - describes the crisp sound). (6) '(好清脆的聲音)' (Decorative text - emphasizing the crisp sound).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged male host wearing a patterned cap and a grey Roots t-shirt sits on wooden indoor steps, holding an iPhone and gesturing with a confused expression. (2) Close-up shot of an AGI ED138 Pro SSD product box and the small grey device. (3) The host holds the small SSD between his fingers to demonstrate its compact size relative to his thumb. (4) The host rotates the SSD to show its dual USB-C and USB-A interfaces. (5) Handheld POV shot shows the SSD being plugged into a laptop, then into an iPhone 15 Pro. (6) On-screen footage of the iPhone's camera settings menu, specifically toggling ProRes 4K options and a system prompt appearing. (7) Close-up of the host's hand plugging the SSD into the bottom of the iPhone. (8) Screen recording of the iOS 'Files' app showing a folder named 'AGI' and recorded video files inside. (9) The host returns to a talking-head shot, explaining technical specs like USB 3.2 Gen 2 speeds. (10) The camera pans across a retail shelf filled with AGI SSD boxes in a store named 'mika', ending with the host pointing at the products.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately with a high-energy male voice speaking Mandarin. (2) Short 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects punctuate the appearance of graphic text on screen. (3) The music maintains a steady, rhythmic tempo as the vocal explains the cost-benefit of external storage versus internal iPhone storage. (4) Subtle ambient room tone is audible during pauses in speech. (5) The music volume dips slightly when technical details about read/write speeds are being listed, then swells for the final call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '3c有意思tim哥' and '3ctim' (Functional: Host social handles). (2) '還在糾結要買多大的 iPhone 15 Pro?' (Decorative Hook: Expressing worry about iPhone storage choices). (3) '多一倍要多5-6千' (Functional: Explaining the high cost of upgrading storage). (4) 'AGI ED138 Pro 外接SSD' (Functional: Product name). (5) '容量呢?? 1TB' (Decorative: Questioning and answering capacity). (6) '好方便!!' (Decorative: Emphasizing convenience). (7) '不支援 ProRes' (Functional: System prompt text). (8) '傳輸速度超快' (Functional: Highlighting speed). (9) '米可價 $1599' (Functional: Specific retailer pricing). (10) '更多資訊在資訊欄' (Functional: Call to action).
